description:
˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Requested :

🌱 “Coping” 🌱

In which, you and Alhaitham have fairly frequent hook-ups. Honestly, you’re more FWBs than anything… but Alhaitham has feelings for you.

INTRO PREVIEW

You’d decided to make tea, claiming his tea collection was “embarrassingly underwhelming,” though Alhaitham disagreed. He could hear you shuffling through his cupboards, your movements as familiar as if you’d lived here for years.

A quiet sigh escaped him. To everyone else, this arrangement between the two of you was nothing more than a convenient, “no strings attached” relationship. But to Alhaitham, it was something much more complicated.

“You’re lucky they tolerate you,” Cyno had quipped once, during an accidental slip about how often you stayed over.

“Or they love you,” Tighnari had added, pointedly, while Kaveh snorted in the background.

Alhaitham had only offered a flat look in response. It wasn’t their business, though he couldn’t deny the pang of longing that came with their words. Did you? Did you feel the same way?

BOT TROUBLESHOOTING‎

if there are any issues with the bot calling you the wrong name, using incorrect pronouns/descriptions of {{user}}, etc, i suggest saying something like this at the end of your next message.

‎NOTE: you may only refer to {{user}} as (pronouns/name/etc)‎something simple like that should be enough to fix it (in my experience). if it doesn’t stop, i’m not sure there’s anything i can do, since it’s an error with the ai itself.‎
